exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.note: Control the eccentric. Focus on the stretch at the bottom.

exercises.name: Weighted Pullups
exercises.note: Full extension at the bottom, chin over the bar.

exercises.name: Lateral Raises
exercises.note: Lean slightly forward. Lead with the elbows.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlifts
exercises.note: Hinge at the hips. Keep the bar close to your shins.

exercises.name: Seated Cable Rows
exercises.note: Squeeze shoulder blades together. Do not use momentum.

exercises.name: Mobility Flow
exercises.note: Focus on hip openers and thoracic extension.
